name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
source: U.S. Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA)
tags: suicide crisis emergency self-harm safety immediate help hotline 24/7 free confidential mental health
description: Free, confidential, 24/7 support for people in suicidal crisis or emotional distress. Call or text 988 anytime to reach a trained crisis counselor.

name: Crisis Text Line
tags: crisis text message anxiety panic self-harm overwhelmed teen youth 24/7 free confidential support
description: Free, 24/7 text-based crisis support. Text HOME to 741741 to message a trained volunteer crisis counselor.

name: SAMHSA National Helpline
source: U.S. Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA)
tags: treatment referral mental health substance use free confidential 24/7 find a provider outpatient connect to care
description: Free, confidential 24/7 treatment referral and information service for individuals and families facing mental health or substance use disorders. Connects you to local treatment and support.

name: FindTreatment.gov
source: U.S. Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA)
tags: find a therapist outpatient behavioral health treatment locator clinic provider follow-up appointment insurance
description: A confidential, anonymous government tool to find local mental health and substance use treatment providers, filterable by location, services, and payment options.

name: 211 (United Way)
tags: local resources food housing rent utilities transportation navigation community services insurance help nearby support
description: Free, confidential service connecting people to local resources: counseling, food, housing, financial help, transportation to appointments, and more. Call or text 211.

name: NAMI HelpLine
tags: mental illness information support family caregiver navigation what to expect medication questions diagnosis advocacy
description: Free peer-support help line offering information, resource referrals, and support for people living with mental health conditions and their families. Mon-Fri.

name: The Trevor Project
tags: LGBTQ lgbtq+ youth teen queer trans gay lesbian crisis suicide identity affirming 24/7 confidential
description: Free, 24/7 crisis support for LGBTQ+ young people. Call, text, or chat with trained counselors who understand LGBTQ+ youth experiences.

name: Teen Line
tags: teen youth peer support talk to someone my age stress school anxiety relationships not an emergency listen
description: A teen-to-teen support line where teens talk with trained teen volunteers about anything on their mind, from everyday stress to bigger struggles. Evenings.

name: The Jed Foundation (JED)
contact: Online guides + Mental Health Resource Center
tags: teen young adult mental health emotional health guides how to help a friend safety plan college school understanding
description: Plain-language guides and tools to help teens and young adults understand mental health, support a friend, and make a safety plan.

name: Trans Lifeline
tags: transgender trans nonbinary peer support crisis community-run by and for trans people identity
description: A peer-support hotline run by and for trans people, offering connection and support without nonconsensual active rescue.
